meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Auriko
products.tagline: Trading desk for LLM calls
products.summaryZh: LLM调用交易台
products.descriptionZh: Auriko将LLM提供商视为交易场所，并利用价差进行套利。由前量化交易员构建，Auriko的成本套利引擎会根据每个用户的请求模式进行校准，并基于Token价格、缓存行为、延迟、可靠性和请求质量选择最优推理路径。Auriko的基准测试显示，与行业同行及直接提供商相比，平均成本降低30%。来源：https://www.auriko.ai/reports/llm-cost-arbitrage
products.description: Auriko treats LLM providers as trading venues and arbitrages the spread. Built by ex-quant traders, Auriko’s cost-arbitrage engine calibrates to each user’s request patterns and selects optimized inference paths based on token price, cache behavior, latency, reliability, and request quality. Auriko benchmarks show average 30% cost reduction against industry peers and direct providers. See the source: https://www.auriko.ai/reports/llm-cost-arbitrage

products.name: Timbal AI
products.tagline: Build AI agents, workflows, and apps in one stack
products.summaryZh: 在一个技术栈中构建AI智能体、工作流和应用
products.descriptionZh: Timbal帮助团队将AI原型转化为生产系统。您可以在一个平台上构建智能体和流程、连接数据、设计界面、部署、监控、评估并管理所有环节。无需拼凑检索、编排、界面、可观测性和评估等独立工具，Timbal为您提供一站式核心方案，助力交付可靠的AI应用。
products.description: Timbal helps teams turn AI prototypes into production systems. Build agents and workflows, connect them to your data, design interfaces, deploy, monitor, evaluate, and govern everything from one platform. Instead of assembling separate tools for retrieval, orchestration, UI, observability, and evals, Timbal gives you one core for shipping reliable AI applications.

products.name: Perfai Security
products.tagline: Find & fix live vulnerabilities in Vibe Apps with 1-prompt.
products.summaryZh: 一键发现并修复Vibe Apps中的实时漏洞。
products.descriptionZh: 面向Vibe编码应用的自主访问控制安全方案。我们的平台可检测并修复基于Replit、Lovable、Claude Code、Cursor及其他AI编码工具构建的Vibe应用中的实时漏洞。仅需一次提示，无需安全专业知识，即可在数分钟内让您的应用达到生产就绪状态。
products.description: Autonomous access control security for Vibe-coded apps. Our platform finds and fixes live vulnerabilities in your vibe-apps built on Replit, Lovable, Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI-coding tools. 1-prompt makes your app production-ready in minutes without requiring security expertise.

products.name: Toyo
products.tagline: Exec assistant who lives in iMessage and calls your phone
products.summaryZh: 执行助理，常驻iMessage并拨打你的电话。
products.descriptionZh: Toyo 是一款内置于消息中的个人AI助手，支持电话通话。您可以像与同事发消息一样与它交流。Toyo 能帮您整理收件箱、为通话做准备、推动项目进展，并从公司工具中提取答案和背景信息。它支持文字和语音交互：当您想获取最新动态或讨论工作内容时，可让它直接给您打电话。Toyo 运行在 iMessage 中，无需安装新应用或管理新标签页。
products.description: Toyo is a personal AI assistant that lives in your messages and can call you on the phone. Talk to it like you'd message a coworker. Toyo triages your inbox, preps you for calls, can help keep your projects moving, and pulls answers and context from your company's tools. It works over text and voice: Have it call you when you want to get updates or just talk through some work. It lives in iMessage, so there's no new apps, and no new tabs to manage.

products.name: Lispr
products.tagline: Hold a key, speak, and Lispr writes it anywhere
products.summaryZh: 按住按键说话，Lispr 就能将内容写入任何位置。
products.descriptionZh: Lispr 是一款适用于 Mac 和 Windows 的免费语音听写与翻译应用。按住按键、说话、松开，你的话语便会直接输入到光标所在的任意应用中。支持约 99 种语言，并可在句子中间切换语种。同时按住翻译键，则可将内容翻译成 32 种语言中的任意一种并输入。中位延迟为 346 毫秒。麦克风仅在按住按键时开启，我们从不存储你的音频。无需账户，无需下载模型，完全免费。
products.description: Lispr is a free voice dictation and translation app for Mac and Windows. Hold a key, speak, release. Your words land in whatever app your cursor is in. Speak in ~99 languages and switch mid-sentence. Hold your translation key as well, and the translation lands instead, in any of 32 languages. Median latency 346 ms. The mic is off until you hold the key, and we never store your audio. No account, no model download, free.

products.name: Opper AI
products.tagline: The european AI gateway for agents
products.summaryZh: 欧洲AI代理网关
products.descriptionZh: 一个API密钥即可访问300多个模型，托管于欧盟境内。与OpenAI、Anthropic和Google SDK即插即用兼容：切换只需更改基础URL。不同之处在于：我们30多家提供商中约有一半在欧洲运行推理，一个欧盟子处理器覆盖所有模型，默认不存储提示词。添加控制平面可实现路由、PII脱敏、按团队支出上限和审计追踪。原生支持智能体：将一行代码粘贴到Claude Code或Cursor中，即可自动为您配置Opper。代币无加价，充值手续费3%。
products.description: One API key to 300+ models, hosted in the EU. Drop-in compatible with the OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google SDKs: switching is a base URL change. What's different: ~half our 30+ providers run inference in Europe, one EU sub-processor covers every model, no prompts stored by default. Add the control plane for routing, PII masking, per-team spend caps, and audit trails. Agent-native: paste one line into Claude Code or Cursor and it sets up Opper for you. No markup on tokens, 3% fee on credit top-ups.

products.name: GPT-Live
products.tagline: Full-duplex voice for ChatGPT
products.summaryZh: ChatGPT 全双工语音
products.descriptionZh: GPT-Live是OpenAI为ChatGPT语音推出的全新全双工语音模型。它能同时听和说，更自然地处理停顿和打断，并在后台将更复杂的搜索或推理任务交给前沿模型处理。
products.description: GPT-Live is OpenAI’s new full-duplex voice model for ChatGPT Voice. It can listen and speak at the same time, handle pauses and interruptions more naturally, and delegate harder search or reasoning work to frontier models in the background.

products.name: Aura: Agents + Git + Intent Open Source
products.tagline: OSS IDE for controlling AI coding agents with built in loops
products.summaryZh: OSS IDE，用于控制内置循环的AI编程代理
products.descriptionZh: Aura 并非又一款编程聊天工具。它是面向 AI 编码代理的原生 Git 集成开发环境。你可以运行代理，在函数和类级别追踪其变更，将代码与原始意图进行对比，并在提交前验证任务是否真正完成。Git 展示的是行级变更，而 Aura 展示的是逻辑层面的变化。
products.description: Aura is not another chat box for coding. It is a Git-native IDE for working with AI coding agents. You can run agents, track their changes at the function and class level, compare the code against the original intent, and prove whether a task was actually completed before you commit. Git shows you lines changed. Aura shows you what changed in the logic.

products.name: Monogram AI
products.tagline: AI with a visual and interactive interface
products.summaryZh: 具备视觉与交互界面的人工智能
products.descriptionZh: 我们想分享新的 iOS 应用。只需提问，Monogram 就会以可视化、交互式界面回应，而非满屏文字。我们开发了一项技术，能在几秒内即时生成完整的用户界面，并保持统一、精良的用户体验。Monogram 专为日常场景设计，无论是寻找影视推荐、查找食谱、规划旅行，还是其他任何想法，都能应对。
products.description: We want to share our new iOS App. Ask anything and Monogram responds with a visual, interactive interface instead of a wall of text. We created a technology that generates an entire user interface on the fly, in just a few seconds. With a consistent and crafted user experience. We designed Monogram for everyday use cases, whether you’re looking for something to watch, finding a recipe, planning a trip, or anything else on your mind.

products.name: Tasks.txt
products.tagline: Plain text task manager for macOS
products.summaryZh: macOS 纯文本任务管理器
products.descriptionZh: 你总在反复打开一个txt文件，所以我让它更快了。Tasks.txt是一款免费的macOS原生应用，专为在txt文件中管理任务的人设计。采用纯文本todo.txt格式，所有操作均支持键盘快捷键。无需云端，无需账户。
products.description: You kept going back to atxt file, so I made it faster. Tasks.txt is a free native macOS app for people who run tasks in atxt file. Plain text todo.txt format, keyboard shortcuts for everything. No cloud, no account.

products.name: Coasty
products.tagline: A Computer-Use-Agent that runs legacy software like a human
products.summaryZh: 一个像人类一样运行旧版软件的计算机使用代理
products.descriptionZh: Coasty是一款端到端操作真实桌面软件的计算机使用代理。最初应用于医疗预授权领域，自动处理支付方门户、传统电子健康记录系统及数据隐私相关的数据清除工作，现已扩展至保险、税务与会计领域。Coasty可自主完成上述工作，支持人工接管并保留完整审计轨迹。在OSWorld Verified（359项任务）中独立验证准确率达82.81%，接近排行榜前列。无需API支持。只要软件有屏幕，Coasty即可运行。
products.description: Coasty is a computer use agent that operates real desktop software end to end. Started with healthcare prior auth, automating payer portals and legacy EHRs, and data removal for data privacy but now we're expanding into insurance and tax & accounting. Coasty does that work autonomously, with human takeover and full audit trails. Independently verified at 82.81% on OSWorld Verified (359 tasks), near the top of the leaderboard. No APIs required. If software has a screen, Coasty can run it.

products.name: Just Ask by SEORCE
products.tagline: Talk to your SEO & AI Visibility data on WhatsApp.
products.summaryZh: 在WhatsApp上查看你的SEO与AI可见性数据。
products.descriptionZh: SEO软件二十年来一成不变：登录、打开面板、生成报告、寻找答案。我们认为该换种界面了。SEORCE让你直接在WhatsApp上与SEO、GEO、分析、反向链接和AI可见性数据对话。用日常英语提出复杂问题，从实时数据中获得即时、可执行的答案。别再翻找面板了。直接问吧。
products.description: SEO software has looked the same for 20 years: log in, open dashboards, build reports, find answers. We think it's time for a new interface. SEORCE lets you chat with your SEO, GEO, Analytics, Backlinks and AI Visibility data directly on WhatsApp. Ask complex questions in plain English and get instant, actionable answers from your live data. Stop searching dashboards. Just ask.

products.name: Constellation Gate AI
products.tagline: Prompt injection and token savings - #1 in benchmarks
products.summaryZh: 提示注入与Token节省——基准测试排名第一
products.descriptionZh: 将AI代理指向Gate。继承提示注入防御、机密扫描和可验证的审计追踪。Gate包含提示压缩和缓存功能，可在不改变模型输出的情况下将令牌使用量减少20-40%。在AI安全基准测试中，Gate在16个公开提示注入数据集中排名第一。保留你的Claude或ChatGPT订阅，通过Gate路由它们，或从100多个模型中选择按需付费。设置简单：使用我们的桌面应用无需更改代码。
products.description: Point your AI agent at Gate. Inherit prompt-injection defense, secret scanning, and a verifiable audit trail. Gate includes prompt compression and caching so you can reduce token usage by 20-40% without changing model output. In AI security benchmarks, Gate ranks #1 across 16 public prompt-injection datasets. Keep your Claude or ChatGPT subscriptions and route them through Gate, or choose from 100+ models pay-as-you-go. Setup is easy: no code changes with our desktop app.

products.name: Glimpse
products.tagline: The competitive intelligence agent
products.summaryZh: 竞争情报代理
products.descriptionZh: 你的竞争对手每天都在行动。Glimpse 是能跟上节奏的 AI 代理。它追踪每个竞争对手的广告、定价、招聘、内容、评论和 AI 搜索，然后将每一次行动转化为你的下一步：始终更新的作战卡片、真实的胜率，以及在交易达成前你在 AI 回答中流失的需求。信息直接推送到 Slack 和你的收件箱。它为你运行整个竞争情报流程，让一个人的团队也能像十人团队一样行动。几分钟内即可免费开始。
products.description: Your competitors move every day. Glimpse is the AI agent that keeps up. It tracks every competitor across ads, pricing, hiring, content, reviews and AI search, then turns each move into your next one: always-current battle cards, your real win rate, and the demand you lose in AI answers before a deal exists. Delivered to Slack and your inbox. It runs the whole competitive program for you, so a team of one moves like a team of ten. Start free in minutes.

products.name: ARKAD Wallet
products.tagline: Control your budget with voice
products.summaryZh: 用语音控制你的预算
products.descriptionZh: ARKAD Wallet是一款以语音为核心的预算管理应用，专为希望掌控财务却不愿被电子表格困扰的用户设计。无需将理财变成第二职业，即可达成财务目标。本次发布推出ARKAD Aura——一项0至100分的个性化财务评分，用于衡量您的资金管理效率，突出优势，并帮助您逐步建立更健康的财务习惯。
products.description: ARKAD Wallet is a voice-first budgeting app for people who want financial control without spreadsheet headaches. Reach your financial goals without turning money management into a second job. This launch introduces ARKAD Aura - a personalized financial score from 0 to 100 that measures how effectively you manage your money, highlights your strengths, and helps you build better financial habits over time.

products.name: Outloud
products.tagline: The AI ghostwriter that runs your socials in your voice
products.summaryZh: AI代笔，用你的风格运营社交媒体
products.descriptionZh: Outloud 会学习你的写作风格，然后自动起草并发布到 X、LinkedIn 和 Threads。你每天都能保持活跃，且内容听起来像你自己，而非 AI。专为那些希望扩大受众但不想每篇都亲自写的人打造。免费开始使用。
products.description: Outloud learns how you write, then drafts and publishes to X, LinkedIn, and Threads on autopilot. You show up daily and sound like yourself, never like AI. Built for anyone who wants to grow an audience without writing every post. Free to start.

products.name: Surge
products.tagline: Turn your startup URL into a weekly content system
products.summaryZh: 将你的初创公司网址转化为每周内容系统
products.descriptionZh: Surge 是一款专为创始人打造的 AI 增长助手。它无需你撰写提示或构思创意，而是通过你的创业公司网站了解其信息，并为你生成每周的平台原生内容计划，涵盖 LinkedIn、X、Reddit、Threads、TikTok 等平台。它还能创建短视频概念、可复用的模板，以及具有创始人风格的内容——听起来像你本人，而非千篇一律的 AI 文案。所有内容都被整理成每周工作流程，让你始终清楚下一步该发布什么。
products.description: Surge is an AI growth assistant built for founders. Instead of asking you to write prompts or brainstorm ideas, Surge learns about your startup from its website and generates a weekly, platform-native content plan for LinkedIn, X, Reddit, Threads, TikTok, and more. It also creates short-form video concepts, reusable templates, and founder-aware content that sounds like you—not generic AI copy. Everything is organized into a weekly workflow so you always know what to post next

products.name: Blocks.ai
products.tagline: The Control Plane and Network Layer For AI Agents
products.summaryZh: AI 智能体的控制平面与网络层
products.descriptionZh: PubNub 今日推出 Blocks.ai，这是一个控制平面与全球网络，用于跨所有智能体框架、提供商和 API 连接并控制智能体。Blocks Network 支持所有 AI 智能体用例，无需开放入站端口、设置隧道、更改 DNS 或修改防火墙规则。十余年来，PubNub 一直是支持数十亿设备的实时连接基础设施与平台，如今，PubNub 推出连接智能体互联网的 Blocks Network。
products.description: PubNub introduces Blocks.ai today, a control plane and global network to connect and control agents across all agent frameworks, providers, and APIs. Blocks Network supports all AI agent use cases without opening inbound ports, setting up tunnels, changing DNS, or modifying firewall rules. For more than a decade, PubNub has been the infrastructure and platform for real-time connectivity supporting billions of devices, now, PubNub delivers Blocks Network connecting the Internet of Agents.

products.name: Konxios
products.tagline: Your AI Operating System - Build, Code & Automate Locally
products.summaryZh: 你的AI操作系统——本地构建、编码与自动化
products.descriptionZh: KonxiOS 是你的AI操作系统与个人助手，全天候运行，可自动执行任务、编写代码、管理工作流、生成UGC视频、实现TTS与STT，并通过内置的智能辅助提升生产力——所有功能均优先使用本地模型，同时可选支持云端模型。
products.description: KonxiOS is your AI operating system and personal assistant running 24/7 that automates tasks, writes code, manages workflows, create UGC videos, TTS, STT and enhances productivity with intelligent assistance built in all using local first models with optional cloud models support

products.name: VerifiedMRR — Private Revenue Dashboards
products.tagline: All your projects' revenue in one dashboard
products.summaryZh: 所有项目的收入，尽在一个仪表盘。
products.descriptionZh: VerifiedMRR为运营多个产品的创始人提供一个私密的收入概览。以只读方式连接支付账户，并列查看净收入、退款、费用、趋势及项目级表现，随后生成基于数据源的月末卡片，用于公开构建的更新。
products.description: VerifiedMRR gives founders running multiple products one private revenue overview. Connect payment accounts read-only, see net revenue, refunds, fees, trends, and project-level performance side by side, then create source-backed month-end cards for build-in-public updates.
